notes: Docker BuildKit `bake` failure where the surface is a clean docker_build error (`failed to solve: process ... exit code 1` at Dockerfile:336) and the underlying root cause is a transient GitHub 502 on a `RUN wget` step. signal_position = `middle` (~48% of 3979 lines) — uniquely stresses tail-200 because the failure block sits before ~2000 lines of post-failure coverage-upload action output. repo_visibility = `redacted` because case.json.redactions[0] strips an AKIA access key + AWS signature + akamai HMAC from a level=debug presigned-S3-URL in a quay.io image-pull line at L3814 (debug noise unrelated to the actual failure).
